message:
style: Clippy and formatting improvements

- allowlist.rs: Use map_or_else instead of match
- main.rs: Simplify stdin handling with chained methods
- simulate.rs: Add const fn, #[must_use], fix doc code formatting
- Cargo.lock: Updated dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
